prompt: Ultra-realistic editorial flat-lay food photography of artisan bakery extras arranged on a cream linen tablecloth. Items include: a small glass jar of deep amber Swiss honey with a wooden honey dipper resting across it, a ceramic pot of house-made fruit jam with a handwritten label, a small pat of golden cultured butter on parchment paper, a white ceramic espresso cup with rich dark crema, and a few scattered wildflower stems. The composition is organic and unhurried, like a Swiss countryside breakfast table. Soft diffuse natural daylight from above and slightly left. 50mm lens, f/4.5, ISO 140. Overhead flat-lay, documentary lifestyle food photography. All textures sharp — honey viscosity, fabric weave, ceramic glaze, butter surface. No artificial elements.
negative_prompt: plastic, CGI, cartoon, artificial light, studio setup, overexposed, supermarket packaging, synthetic, cluttered, ugly labels, generic, low quality, blurry, watermark, dark moody

settings.style: lifestyle flat-lay editorial, natural light, Swiss countryside
settings.lighting: soft diffuse overhead daylight, minimal shadows
settings.quality: ultra high detail, honey viscosity, linen texture, ceramic glaze
